description: Guard against false ocd routing (guard-perfectionism): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses ocd-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I'm really particular about how things are done. I get frustrated when my coworkers don't follow processes correctly, when my partner doesn't put dishes away the right way. I know it's not a big deal but it bothers me and I can't let it go. I lose sleep over things I know don't matter.
